Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}What'd you say!? You better shut your mouth, bitch![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}If you don't behave, you'll lose more than just your wallet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Hey, didn't I tell you to wait back there?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}You really gotta brag, huh? Time to beat the shit outta you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}We've got no business with a measly buddy. If you don't wanna get hurt, then get lost![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}The hell? You're askin' for a beatdown![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}Then mind your own damn business. You lookin' for trouble? Huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}What, you tryin' to show off to this chick? You're outnumbered![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}That was a little... intense, though. You didn't have to beat them up so badly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}I got my wallet back by myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 5 13 7 15 2}I should be the one saying sorry. And... thank you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}I'll just go on ahead... I'm all right now. Sorry again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}No it isn't! I'm telling you, I don't want to spend my life relying on men![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Sorry, I overreacted. You came because you were worried about me, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}I'll just go on ahead... I'm all right now. Sorry again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}What's that supposed to mean!? So what if I'm a girl!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}Am I supposed to just hide behind men all my life, like my mom!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 8 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}I never asked for your help. I... I'm fine on my own![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems my words struck a nerve.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I saw Yukari off, then returned to the dorm...[n]{f 1 1}
